title: Vežba 106

questions.text: Bob anapenda wazo hilo lakini ana wasiwasi. Atasema nini?

answers.answer: That's a good idea, but wouldn't it complicate the budget?
That's not necessary. Let's just keep the stipend the same.
answers.feedback: Ovo ne prihvata Aninu ideju pre nego što izrazi zabrinutost.

dialogue.text: How about we split the stipend into two parts?
That way people can use part of it for technology upgrades and part for office furniture or other home office needs.

instructions: Slušaj audio snimak i odgovori na pitanje koje je navedeno ispod.
explanation:
That's a good idea, but... je način da se složite sa nekim, a zatim izrazite zabrinutost. Na primer:

  • Mfanyakazi: We could hold a meeting to discuss the new project.

  • Menadžer projekta: That's a good idea, but maybe we should first gather all the necessary information. – Ova osoba prihvata predlog, ali smatra da je bolje prvo prikupiti sve potrebne informacije.

Bob prihvata Anin predlog pre nego što izrazi zabrinutost zbog budžeta.
